visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and makeup is seen from the chest up, looking into the camera in a brightly lit indoor room with a plain white wall and a hint of a green pillow behind her. She wears a blue tank top under a black zip-up jacket. (2) She begins to lift her hands towards her head, moving her fingers through her hair while speaking. (3) She gathers her hair behind her head as if preparing to tie it into a ponytail, looking upward and then back at the lens. (4) As she holds her hair up, digital heart and tear graphics appear on screen near her face. (5) She finishes her sentence with a slight smirk and a tilt of her head, still holding her hair, before the video cuts off.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 其實呢. (2) [Subtitle]: 我一直以來. (3) [Subtitle]: 都很內向. (4) [Subtitle]: 怎麼說呢…. (5) [Subtitle]: 就好像... 我想跟我前男友分手. (6) [Subtitle]: 我不敢說. (7) [Variety]: 痛苦面具... 5555. 我哭了我... 好委屈. [Subtitle]: 所以我就叫我的新男友跟他説.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator recording a selfie video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a greyish-blue low-cut sports top and a black open jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of a plain white wall, a vertical white metal pole (possibly a lamp or rack), and a bright green pillow or fabric on a bed or sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice speaks with a calm but slightly conspiratorial tone, with high clarity and moderate pitch. There is no background music, creating a direct conversational feel. (2) As she continues speaking, the vocal pitch rises slightly during the explanation of a personal dilemma, followed by a brief rustling sound of fabric. (3) A cartoonish 'pop' or 'ding' sound effect occurs as text overlays appear. (4) The audio concludes with a humorous meme sound effect (resembling a cricket or a subtle 'huh?' cue) immediately after the final punchline about her new boyfriend.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a short comedy skit designed to subvert expectations. The creator starts with a vulnerable confession about being 'introverted' and 'shy,' specifically regarding breaking up with an ex-boyfriend, only to reveal a shocking and humorous contradiction: she had her new boyfriend deliver the breakup news for her.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a common social media comedy trope of 'dry humor' and irony, where the visual vulnerability of the person contrasts with the absurdity of the spoken content.
